input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.3.5.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.3.5.4
            TITLE: the respective data of each run in which a team has a violation and the resulting decision may

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.3.5.4: The respective data of each run in which a team has a Violation and the resulting decision may
EV.3.5.4 The respective data of each run in which a team has a Violation and the resulting decision may 
be made public.

final_answer: EV.3.5.4 The respective data of each run in which a team has a Violation and the resulting decision may be made public.
